TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jim_Brewer, title = Jim_Brewer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Brewer} }

S.FORM: Jim Brewer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 12, Jim Brewer, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jim Brewer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 12, Jim Brewer, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *im βrewer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *im βrewer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
